description: A control room operator is tracking the real-time progress of a PIG as it travels through a natural gas pipeline.

nodes.task_description: Monitor the PIG's location using its onboard transmitter and sensors placed along the pipeline.

expected_outcome.value: System displays the PIG's current location and speed on a map.

nodes.task_description: The system detects that the PIG has stopped moving, indicating it may be stuck.

expected_outcome.value: System generates an alert that the PIG is no longer progressing.

nodes.task_description: Dispatch a field crew to the PIG's last known location to investigate and retrieve the tool.

expected_outcome.value: System creates a work order for the field crew.
